arts.ttl: Real Sociedad trio absent from training before Leganés
arts.sum: Three members of the first-team ranks at La Liga outfit Real Sociedad played no part in group training on Saturday. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who have provided an insight…

Real Sociedad are on a disappointing run of form, winning just once in their previous five fixtures. La Real were beaten convincingly last time out as Real Betis secured a 3-0 victory. They're still i...
